Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}У моєї подруги є кіт, і він дуууже милий![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}I want one too, but my mom hates animals...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}I played with my friend's cat at his house again.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}I know my mom hates animals, but maybe I should ask her...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}I asked my mom for a cat, and she said no.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}"No," "No," "No"... That's all she ever says.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}I tried to convince my dad to get a cat.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}Cats cost a lot, and their food and stuff costs a lot too...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}So we can't afford one.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}I asked my friend if his cat was really expensive.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}You know what? He said it was free![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}He said his mom got the cat from the animal shelter.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}I didn't know you could do that. I thought you could only get cats from pet stores.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}I talked to my dad about getting a cat again.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}I told him cats from the animal shelter are free...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}But he still said no.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}Even though he's okay with it, if my mom says no, he has to say no, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}So only my mom can decide... My dad sucks.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}My friend at school said there was a stray cat around here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}I'm waiting here until he comes out.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}I'm not gonna catch him or anything, I just want to see him.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}I wonder what kind of cat he is...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}You know how there's a lot of food places here?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}That stray cat gets leftovers from the owners.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}I asked them what time the cat usually comes, and they told me...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}I'm gonna see that cat no matter what![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}What kind of cat do you think this is?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}Okay! Then I'll tell you![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}Aww... You could tell, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}You're so mean! But I'll tell you the answer anyway...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}But he's my friend. The first time I met him, he didn't even run away. He came up to my hand.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}So that means he's my "soulmate," right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}He only eats leftovers from the shops...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}I think he's getting tired of it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}Maybe I should get a saucer of milk for him![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}Yeah, I'm gonna go buy some milk. He'll like that, I think.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}Yeah! He'll probably love it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}R-Really!? He'll get a stomachache if he drinks regular milk?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}I didn't know that! Thanks so much for telling me![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}I'm gonna buy him some milk for next time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}So regular milk is bad for cats... Okay, I'll remember that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}I asked my friends about what to feed cats, and I read about it, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}I found out there's a lot of things that cats shouldn't eat.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}Like that milk I wanted to give him last time, that's one of them.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}I was surprised, but I learned something.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}I asked my dad if I can take this cat home.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}He said he wouldn't mind, but it's all up to my mom.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}*sigh* I know what she's going to say... What should I do...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}What should I do? That cat went somewhere...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}No one knows where he went.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}Maybe it was 'cause of that typhoon?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}If he could've come home with me before, this wouldn't have happened...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}Hey, look! Look! The cat came back![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}Wow... He survived the typhoon.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}Or did he just hide somewhere?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}Well, it doesn't matter. Either way, I'm glad he's okay.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}I decided I want to take that cat home with me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}I'm going to convince my mom to let me keep him as a pet.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}No matter what she says, I'm not gonna back down.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}That man and the lady... The old man and old lady, too...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}Why are they just standing there, staring at nothing...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}Are they so tired that they don't want to do anything anymore?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}My mom said I can't have a cat, no matter what.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}But it's okay. My dad is on my side![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}I'm gonna learn all about cats, and show her I can take care of one...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}Then my dad will convince my mom![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}I can just go inside, but I wonder about him...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}I heard there's a lot of warm places around here, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}Is he really going to be okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}I studied all about cats.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}I learned cats can't see the color red. I wonder what that's like...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}I studied all about cats, and I told my dad about it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}He said I did a great job, and he was impressed![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}And he promised he was gonna convince my mom![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}I hope I can get this cat...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}This cat has been acting weird. He keeps staring into space.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}I don't understand.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}But I think my mom's going to let me keep this cat soon![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}Today, when my dad comes home from work, we're going to ask together.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}I tried putting on cat ears, but the cat still won't even look at me...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}Maybe if I had a cat toy... But I don't think I have enough to buy one...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}Oh! Is that a cat toy!? Do you have a pet cat?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}I should give you something in exchange... Oh, I know![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}You can have this cat ear headband. I don't need it anymore.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe Elizabeth would like this headband...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should try showing it to her.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}Oh, really? I wish I had a cat.[n]{f 1 1}
